title: Ores Core
description: Ending the material fragmentation nightmare. A high-performance foundation with 90+ materials, 5,000+ variations, and ∞ ore possibilities to unify every mod into one seamless experience.
body:
![Ores Core logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/480d77abf4ef88f119aac30165a92becacb3da05_0.webp)

💎 Ores Core: The Dynamic Resource Engine

The ultimate high-performance library for material unification and resource creation in Minecraft 26.1+.

--- ### 🧩 THE MUST-HAVE COMPANION: Ores Mods To unlock the full potential of Ores Core and ensure a clean, unified experience, we highly recommend installing our official companion mod: 👉 **[Download ORES MODS on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/project/ores-mods)** **Ores Mods** handles the **Total Material Unification** (unifying identical resources like ingots, plates, and gears from different mods) and enables **Infinite Ore Generation** in any custom stone or dimension. --- ### 🌟 A New Era of Integrated Modding **Ores Core** is more than just a library; it’s a mission to build a unified ecosystem where every mod feels like a native part of the same game. **Together, we can end the era of duplicate materials and messy modpacks.** ### 🚀 Why Choose Ores Core? * **🚫 No More Duplicate Materials:** End the "Material Nightmare" where five mods add five different versions of "Tin Ingot". Everything is unified under a single set of tags and items. * **🎨 Dynamic Asset Generation:** Textures, models, and loot tables are generated on the fly. It only creates what your modpack actually uses, keeping it lightweight and performance-friendly. * **⚙️ NEW: In-Game Configuration:** Master your world's economy directly from the game menu with our new **Configuration UI**. Override hardness, resistance, mining levels, and visual properties in real-time. * **🏔️ Advanced World Generation:** A bespoke system with custom ore shapes (`PLATE`, `HORIZONTAL`, `VERTICAL`, `BLOB`) and advanced vertical distributions (`GAUSSIAN`, `TRAPEZOID`, etc.). * **⚡ Zero Dependencies:** Lightweight, blazing fast, and designed for total stability on both **Fabric** and **NeoForge**. --- ### ♾️ Infinite Ore Compatibility: Any Stone, Any Dimension The days of "ugly stone ores" in the middle of beautiful modded terrain are over. * **Infinite Host Blocks:** Dynamically inject any material into **any solid block**, whether it's Vanilla or from a complex modded terrain (Granite, Basalt, Marble, etc.). * **Seamless Immersion:** Generated ores perfectly match the texture and physical properties of their host block, making them feel like a natural part of the world. * **Custom Effects:** Create ores that emit light, generate particles, or are subject to gravity to warn or challenge players. > 🛠️ **Are you a Stone or Terrain Modder?** Join the ecosystem! By integrating Ores Core, you ensure that every mod using this library will automatically feature its ores within your custom stones. --- ### 🛠️ For Developers & Modpack Creators Stop wasting time manually registering 90+ standard materials. Focus purely on your mod's unique logic while we handle the repetitive work. * **[Full Wiki Documentation](https://github.com/MathieuDorval/ORES-CORE/wiki)** * **[Interactive Registry Generator](https://mathieudorval.github.io/ORES-CORE/tools/registry_generator.html)** * **[Ore Gen Manager](https://mathieudorval.github.io/ORES-CORE/tools/ore_gen_manager.html)** * **[Material Reference Explorer](https://mathieudorval.github.io/ORES-CORE/tools/material_reference.html)** --- ### 🌍 Global Support Native localization for 🇺🇸 EN, 🇫🇷 FR, 🇪🇸 ES, 🇮🇹 IT, 🇩🇪 DE, 🇧🇷 PT, 🇷🇺 RU, 🇨🇳 ZH, 🇯🇵 JP. ### 📄 License & Credits Licensed under [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/). Developed with ❤️ by **\_\_mathieu**.
